creator: dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp
text:

I use fluxbox as x11-wm.

How-To-Repeat: install ports/textproc/ibus/
install ports/japanese/ibus-anthy/ 

follow instruction in ports/textproc/ibus/pkg-messages
and then run ibus-daemon &
